text:
Your stack is not your workflow.

Most operationally complex teams have the tools:
→ Microsoft 365
→ Jira
→ Confluence
→ Slack or Teams

But the workflow between them? That’s where things break.

Data lives in one system. Decisions happen in another.
Context is scattered across meetings, docs, and chat threads.

The result: someone manually stitches it all together
every week. And nobody fully trusts the output.

The fix isn’t another tool. It’s a workflow layer that
connects the tools you already have.

💾 Save this if your team’s stack is fine but the
workflow between tools is broken.

#executiveworkflows #systemsintegration #enterprisetech
